CustomField.description: Used in the Training Checklist DocuSign templates to identify the Trainer’s email address.
CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(Educator_Type__c),
"CPT", External_Trainer__r.PersonContact.Email, "CC", External_Trainer__r.PersonContact.Email,
"IT", IF(ISBLANK(Internal_Trainer__c), CSM__r.Email, Internal_Trainer__r.Email),
"CTS", IF(ISBLANK(Internal_Trainer__c), CSM__r.Email, Internal_Trainer__r.Email),
NULL )
CustomField.label: Assigned Trainer Email
